extortion.description: [AI generated] Koch Logistics is a worldwide logistics service provider based in Minnesota, U.S. The company, a division of Koch Companies, offers a range of services, including transportation, warehousing, and supply chain management. Their services extend to truckload, less-than-truckload, international, intermodal, air freight, and ocean shipping. They serve various industries such as retail, food, and manufacturing with a customer-focused approach to logistic solutions.
